name: Soyuz-FG / Fregat
first: The launcher that put every Marte Express, Cluster, and ESA-Roscosmos joint missione on its way
description: Soyuz-FG (now retired) plus the Fregat upper stage — the standard ESA-Roscosmos pairing for medium interplanetary missioni. The cryogenic-free design uses kerosene-LOX in the lower stages and Fregat's restartable hypergolic propellants for precise injection. Launched ESA's Marte Express (2003), the Cluster magnetospheric quartet, and most pre-Soyuz-2 ISS resupply flights.
